message:
refactor(pthread): remove join host delegation fallbacks

pthread_join, pthread_timedjoin_np, pthread_tryjoin_np, and
pthread_clockjoin_np now always use native implementations instead
of delegating to host for non-managed threads. This follows the same
pattern as pthread_getattr_np.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
